name: School Friends
overview: A slice-of-life show that explores the lives of 5 quirky school teenagers who've just entered 11th Commerce, as they navigate friendships, heartbreaks, peer pressures, more importantly figuring out who they really want to be. All this in a society that finds it difficult to cope with the fast-changing Gen Z world.
